name: Beef Tortilla Casserole
keywords: mexican tortillas main dish sauces meats
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Spread a thin layer of Basic Red Sauce in the bottom of a greased 9x13 inch baking dish.
3. Arrange half of the corn tortillas on top of the sauce, overlapping slightly.
4. Top the tortillas with an even layer of ground beef.
5. Sprinkle chopped Anaheim chiles over the beef.
6. Cover the beans and shredded cheese evenly over the filling.
7. Pour the Southwest Guacamole over the top.
8. Drizzle additional Basic Red Sauce if desired, then spread remaining corn tortillas on top.
9. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until heated through and bubbly.
10. Let cool slightly before serving with a dollop of dairy sour cream on each portion.
